label: Assert Condition
description: Halt the workflow with an error if a condition is false. Use to guard against insufficient credits, full storage, missing variables, etc. Condition uses the same syntax as runIf (comparisons, {{variable}} paths, truthiness).

inputs.description: Expression to evaluate (same syntax as runIf)
Error message if condition is false (supports {{variable}} templates)

formSchema.label: Error message if false
formSchema.hint: Shown when the workflow halts. Supports {{variable}} templates.
